calendar.matters:
First Account And Report Of Trustee Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And For Allowance
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanda Ebey for and with Irene Barnard, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Roger B. Mead for Andrei Brodzik, Successor Trustee (via Zoom).
G. Franchesca Callejo, Guardian ad Litem for Inna I. Brodzik, Settlor (via Zoom).

Ms. Callejo reported that Inna Brodzik was content with the current petition. There were no objections from any party to appointing Debra Dolch as successor trustee. The court took the matter under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

First Account And Report Of Trustee Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And For Allowance
Off Calendar Jan-14-2025 Continued To Feb-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanda Ebey for Irene Barnard, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Roger Mead for Andrei Brodzik, Named Successor Trustee (via Zoom).
G. Franchesca Callejo, Guardian Ad Litem for Inna I. Brodzik, Settlor (via Zoom).

Ms. Callejo reported that she has not yet met with the settlor but plans to do so this week and requested a short continuance to allow time to meet with the settlor and follow up with counsel as to whether there are any objections.

The court continued the matter to February 4, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204 to allow the Guardian Ad Litem to meet with the settlor and report back to counsel.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

First Account And Report Of Trustee Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And For Allowance
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Continued To Jan-14-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Amanda L. Ebey for and with Irene Barnard, Petitioner (via Zoom).
Roger Mead for Andrei Brodzik, Successor Trustee (via Zoom).

Ms. Ebey reports to the court that an appointment of a guardian ad litem for Ms. Brodzik remains pending, awaiting a capacity declaration. The court acknowledged the statement of non-opposition from Mr. Mead and agreed to review proposed order language after submission of all required documentation. The court continued the hearing to January 14, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow time to submit the capacity declaration and complete necessary filings.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

First Account And Report Of Trustee Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And For Allowance
Off Calendar Oct-22-2024 Continued To Dec-03-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for and with Irene Barnard by zoom.
Roger Mead appeared by zoom for Andrei Brodzik.

Mr. Mead requested a continuance until January. Mrs. Ebey stated that Mr. Brodzik has been granted numerous opportunities to find counsel, that she is okay with a short continuance and that Mr. Mead indicated that his client is not objecting. Mr. Mead stated that he has not had the opportunity to investigate the circumstances. The First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is continued to December 3, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Mead is to file his objections by November 26, 2024. Further discussion was held regarding the need for the appointment of a guardian ad litem for Inna Brodzik and Mrs. Ebey filing an ex parte petition.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Colhour. Not reported.

First Account And Report Of Trustee Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And For Allowance
Off Calendar Oct-02-2024 Continued To Oct-22-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared by zoom for and with Irene Barnard (petitioner and trustee) by zoom.
Andrei Brodzik (son) appeared by courtcall in propria persona.

When asked if he was objecting to the petition, Mr. Brodzik stated that he was objecting to how he was being characterized, that he has some physical/medical issues and requested 30 to 45-days to get representation. Discussion was held regarding Mr. Brodzik's concern about being involved with his mother's medical needs and care, his position that if he remains on as trustee, he would want someone else to come in and handle the finances, what he would do and how he would make sure to get here to be available for his mother, Mrs. Dolch's policy of working with family members with regard to care and placement, Mrs. Ebey's understanding that Mr. Brodzik does not object to Debra Dolch being appointed, Mr. Brodzik having called Mrs. Dolch, but her not being willing to talk with him unless she is appointed, etc. The First Account and Report of Trustee, etc. is continued to October 22, 2024, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mrs. Ebey will contact Mrs. Dolch and ask her to speak with Mr. Brodzik. If Mr. Brodzik wants to object to the petition, he needs to file his objections in writing by October 16, 2024. If they are not filed by then, his objections will be deemed waived.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

First Account And Report Of Trustee Petition For Appointment Of Successor Trustee And For Allowance Of Copmpensation To Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-04-2024 Continued To Oct-02-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
